elements.original_description: A group of well-dressed people standing together in formal attire, smiling and chatting. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a group of well-dressed people standing together in formal attire, smiling and chatting in a sophisticated setting. Cinematic lighting, rich colors, elegant atmosphere, high resolution, sharp focus, professional composition, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
